steps.description: Click the "View prompts" link in the chat interface of the "data-analyst-v2-local" channel within Microsoft Teams to display prompt suggestions for the Data Analyst bot.

Click the "Annual sales from 2020-2022?" prompt suggestion in the popup menu within the data-analyst-v2-local chatbot interface on Microsoft Teams (web version), as indicated by the red crosshair on the highlighted prompt card.
Press the Enter key in the chat input box of the "data-analyst-v2-local" bot conversation in Microsoft Teams to submit the message "Annual sales from 2020-2022?".
@assertion bot has responsed user's question and  without any error content.
Click the red close button (“X”) at the top-right corner of the Microsoft Teams web application window in Google Chrome to close the tab.
